EmailTemplate.name: Case: gateB_Support_Case_Auto_Response_EN
EmailTemplate.subject: Your Support Request Nr. {!Case.CaseNumber}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear user
Your support request {!Case.Subject} has been opened with the following reference number: {!Case.CaseNumber}. We will process your request as soon as possible.
If you have any questions or clarifications on this request, we would kindly ask you to respond to this specific email in order for your request to be reassigned correctly.
Kind regards gateB support
gateB AG | Empowering Marketing Performance
Sennweidstrasse 35, CH-6312 Steinhausen Phone +41 41 748 64 10, support@gateb.com http://www.gateb.com
Our opening hours: Mondays to Fridays from 8:00 AM to 12:00 AM and 1:00 PM to 5:00 PM CET
Thread Id: (ref:_{!Organization.Id}._{!Case.Id}:ref)
